install.title: Add Vin.ID to your home screen
install.ios: Tap the Share button, then "Add to Home Screen".
install.android: Tap the browser menu, then "Add to Home screen" / "Install app".
install.generic: Use your browser menu to add Vin.ID to your home screen.
install.cardSubtitle: Add Vin.ID to your home screen for quick, full-screen access.
install.dialogTitle: Add Vin.ID to your home screen
install.dialogIntro: Install Vin.ID like an app — quick, full-screen access, no app store needed.
iosSteps: Tap the Share button (the square with an arrow) at the bottom of the screen.
Scroll down and tap "Add to Home Screen".
Tap "Add" in the top corner. The Vin.ID icon will appear on your home screen.
androidSteps: Tap the menu button (⋮) in the top corner.
Tap "Add to Home screen" or "Install app".
Tap "Add" / "Install" to confirm. The Vin.ID icon will appear on your home screen.
genericSteps: Open Vin.ID in your phone's browser.
Choose "Add to Home screen" or "Install app".
Confirm to add the Vin.ID icon to your home screen.
install.alreadyInstalled: Vin.ID is already installed on your home screen.

hero.headline: Build a trusted digital history for your vehicle.
hero.subheadline: Track maintenance, issues, documents, reminders, and create a Vehicle Passport you can share when selling or transferring a vehicle.

problem.title: Vehicle history is scattered
points: Receipts, photos, chats, and memory — a vehicle's history lives in too many places.
Buyers need more context than a listing can give.
Sellers need a clean way to show what is actually documented.

history.title: Vehicle history
history.body: One place for everything you know about your vehicle.

maintenance.title: Maintenance logs
maintenance.body: Record services with dates, mileage, and trust labels.

issues.title: Issue logs
issues.body: Track symptoms and how they were handled.

documents.title: Documents
documents.body: Keep registration, insurance, and invoices — private by default.

reminders.title: Reminders
reminders.body: Stay ahead of service, inspection, and renewals.

passport.title: Vehicle Passport
passport.body: A shareable, tamper-evident snapshot of selected history.

passport.title: The Vehicle Passport
passport.lead: A shareable snapshot of the vehicle history you choose to include.
points: Shows what is documented, what is missing, and what was shared.
Includes a Record Confidence Score that reflects documentation quality.
A buyer can preview it before deciding.
A buyer can accept it to copy the shared history into their account.
disclaimers: A tamper-evident snapshot — not an official ownership document.
Not a mechanical certification or a guarantee of condition.
Record Confidence measures documentation quality, not the vehicle's condition.

beta.title: Vin.ID is in beta
points: We're testing with early users — expect rough edges.
Please don't rely on Vin.ID for safety-critical decisions.
A Vehicle Passport should complement, not replace, a professional inspection.
beta.mockNote: AI diagnosis and document extraction are currently mock/demo — not real AI or OCR.

privacy.title: Privacy & trust
points: Your documents are private by default.
You control exactly what a Vehicle Passport shares.
A public Passport preview shows only the snapshot data you selected.
Original document files are not copied during a transfer in the current beta.
No third-party analytics provider is used.

cta.title: Start building your vehicle's digital history
cta.subtitle: Free during the beta.

landing.testerNote: Testing Vin.ID beta? Send feedback from Settings inside the app.

dataPrivacy.title: Data & privacy
dataPrivacy.intro: Your Vin.ID account may include vehicle history, documents metadata, Passport snapshots, reminders, diagnosis history, and beta feedback.
dataPrivacy.exportHelp: Exports include your account data and vehicle history, but not original uploaded document files.
dataPrivacy.exportWarning: Keep exported files private. They may contain sensitive vehicle and personal information.

deletion.title: Account deletion
deletion.body: Automated deletion is not enabled in beta yet. You can request deletion below (or send feedback) and we'll handle it manually. Your data is not deleted automatically.
deletion.confirmBody: This sends a deletion request to the Vin.ID team. Your data is NOT deleted automatically — we'll follow up to confirm.
deletion.done: Deletion request sent. We'll follow up. Your data has not been deleted automatically.
deletion.error: We couldn't send your request. Please try again.

feedback.title: Send beta feedback
feedback.help: Vin.ID is in beta. Tell us what's broken, confusing, or missing.
feedback.betaPrompt: Using Vin.ID beta? Tell us what was confusing.
feedback.betaGuideNote: Beta tester? Follow the test guide (docs/beta-test-script.md) and send your results here.
feedback.messagePlaceholder: What happened, or what would help?

errors.submitFailed: We couldn't send your feedback. Please try again.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.intro: How Vin.ID handles your data during the beta.
points: Vin.ID stores the vehicle data you provide (vehicles, maintenance, issues, documents, reminders).
Documents you upload may contain personal information. Review them carefully before sharing.
Vehicle Passport sharing is controlled by you — only the data you choose is included.
Public Passport links expose only the selected snapshot data, not your account or raw files.
Documents are private by default and are shared only if you explicitly allow it.
AI-style features run in mock mode (not real AI analysis) while MOCK_AI is enabled.

We log minimal product events during the beta (e.g. that a vehicle or Passport was created) to understand usage. These never include document contents, issue symptoms, diagnosis text, VIN, license plate, storage paths, or raw Passport tokens, and we do not use any third-party analytics provider.

You can export your account data and vehicle history from Settings (JSON and CSV). Exports do not include your original uploaded document files, and may contain sensitive information — keep them private.
Automated account deletion is not enabled during the beta. You can request deletion from Settings and we will handle it manually; full self-service automation may come later.

Document scanning is optional. When you scan a document, its image is sent to a third-party AI provider (Anthropic) for extraction, and the original image is saved to your private vehicle documents (private by default) and linked to the record you confirm so you can open it later.
privacy.betaNote: This is a beta privacy summary, not a final legal document.

terms.title: Terms
terms.intro: Please read these beta terms before using Vin.ID.
points: Vin.ID is not an official ownership, title, or registration system.
A Vehicle Passport is not a mechanical certification or a guarantee of condition.
Diagnosis guidance is informational only and does not replace a qualified mechanic.
You are responsible for verifying vehicle information before buying or selling.
This is beta software and may contain bugs or change at any time.
Do not rely on Vin.ID for safety-critical decisions.
terms.betaNote: These are beta terms, not a final legal agreement.

share.freshLinkNote: For security, the full share link is shown only immediately after creation. Create a new Passport if you need a fresh share link.

consent.title: Before you continue
consent.body: To read this document, its image is sent to a third-party AI provider (Anthropic) for processing, and the original image is saved to your private vehicle documents so you can open it later. Don't scan documents with sensitive personal information you don't want processed externally or stored.
consent.checkbox: I understand and want to process this document with the AI provider and save it to my private vehicle documents.

review.trustNote: This record will be saved as “AI-extracted” (you confirmed it).
